creator: hiroo.ono+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 222024
local patch for an interim fix.

As reported in comment to bug #252742, wsdd 0.6.3 has a bug that it does not work on FreeBSD.
https://github.com/christgau/wsdd/issues/80
While waiting for a fix, as suggested in the issue, add local patch for an interim fix.
